title: Multidisciplinary Review Packet Template v0

sources.label: BCMA Claim Set Expert Review Packet v0
MRD And Relapse Measurement Glossary v0
High-Risk, Extramedullary, Organ, And Frailty Context Modifier Map v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide expanded-access guidance for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not make any artifact expert-reviewed.
Must not be filled publicly with real case facts, identifiers, raw records, dates tied to a person, images, free-text notes, candidate options, rankings, or decisions.
Reviewer prompts do not establish clinical truth, trial eligibility, site availability, sponsor availability, regulatory feasibility, clinical safety, comparative benefit, or patient fit.

Requires qualified reviewers, mapped comments, publication-gate review, metadata, provenance, uncertainty, limitations, clinical-use boundary text, and validation before any downstream artifact update.
